sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Finward Bancorp director Anthony Puntillo acquires $233 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Anthony Puntillo, a director at Finward Bancorp, recently acquired 6.5204 shares of the company's common stock for $233 through its Dividend Reinvestment Plan. This increases his direct holdings to 2,321.0172 shares, with an additional 3,378 shares held indirectly. The acquisition coincides with strong stock momentum, a 7.73% return over the past week, and the company's consistent dividend payments for 29 years.

feed.title: Endeavour Silver Corp. Trade Ideas — SIX:EXK.USD
feed.summary: This article compiles various trading ideas and analyses for Endeavour Silver Corp. (EXK.USD) from multiple traders on TradingView. The ideas include price targets, entry/stop levels, risk/reward ratios, and technical analysis such as double bottoms, symmetrical triangles, and bullish pennants, with a general bullish sentiment towards silver and EXK. Many traders emphasize that these are personal references and advise others to do their own research and risk assessment.

feed.title: FirstEnergy to discuss Q2 results on July 29 webcast
feed.summary: FirstEnergy (NYSE: FE) will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after markets close on Tuesday, July 28. Management will then host an earnings teleconference at 9 a.m. EDT on Wednesday, July 29, which will include a live webcast and presentation slides available on the investor relations website. The webcast and materials will be available for replay for up to one year.

feed.title: FirstEnergy to Webcast Second Quarter Earnings Teleconference
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after markets close on Tuesday, July 28. Management will discuss these results during a conference call with financial analysts at 9 a.m. EDT on Wednesday, July 29, which will include a live webcast and presentation slides accessible via FirstEnergy's Investor Information website. The webcast and materials will be available for replay for up to one year.

feed.title: Despite Franchisees Struggling, McDonald’s Dividend Keeps Rising
feed.summary: McDonald's (MCD) has maintained its strong dividend growth, including a recent 5% raise, despite its franchisees facing significant struggles due to inflation, tariffs, and weak consumer sentiment. This resilience is attributed to McDonald's asset-light royalty model, where the corporate entity collects royalties and rent from its 90% franchised restaurants, insulating it from the direct operating costs and pressures experienced by individual operators. The company's robust free cash flow generation comfortably covers its dividend payments, ensuring its status as an "A-grade dividend payer" while the disconnect between corporate profitability and franchisee hardships persists.

feed.title: Chevron schedules July 31 earnings call with CEO Mike Wirth
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) has announced its second quarter 2026 earnings conference call will take place on Friday, July 31, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The call will feature CEO Mike Wirth, CFO Eimear Bonner, President of New Energies Jeff Gustavson, and Head of Investor Relations Jeanine Wai. Investors can access the live webcast via Chevron's website.

feed.title: Ondo brings tokenized IVV and Micron shares into U.S. market
feed.summary: Ondo Finance, in partnership with Broadridge Financial Solutions, has launched the first live third-party custodial tokenized U.S. securities, including BlackRock iShares Core S&P 500 (IVV) ETF and Micron (MU) shares, operating within the existing U.S. regulatory framework. These tokenized securities are backed 1:1 by underlying assets, and Broadridge's ProxyVote.com platform ensures token holders retain shareholder rights, including proxy voting and regulatory disclosures. This initiative marks a significant step in expanding access to onchain investments in the U.S. while upholding regulatory compliance and investor protections.

feed.title: 3M Company steadies its portfolio. Diversified industrial focus supports long-term profile
feed.summary: 3M Company continues to operate as a diversified industrial conglomerate with a broad portfolio across safety, healthcare, and consumer products. The company focuses on operational efficiency, cost discipline, and innovation to streamline its structure and concentrate on growth areas. Its long-term performance is expected to depend on effectively managing innovation, portfolio breadth, and capital allocation decisions, alongside navigating economic trends and regulatory considerations.

feed.title: Travelers develops proprietary LLM for its P&C business
feed.summary: Travelers Companies has developed a proprietary large language model, TravelersLLM, specifically for its P&C business. This model is designed to improve underwriting analysis and speed up research and model development. Travelers stated that it serves as a foundational capability for agentic applications across the entire enterprise.

feed.title: Targa Resources Corp outlook amid evolving US energy demand
feed.summary: This article examines Targa Resources Corp's position in the evolving US midstream energy market, focusing on how the company is adapting to changing demand patterns, regulations, and infrastructure investment. It highlights Targa's fee-based contract model designed to mitigate commodity price volatility and stresses the importance of long-term service agreements and careful capital allocation for future growth. The article also provides key data about Targa Resources Corp, emphasizing its role in gathering, processing, and transporting natural gas and natural gas liquids.

feed.title: Bunge Global business model in focus as agricultural trade evolves
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA operates as a major agribusiness and food company, connecting farmers with processors and end customers across global supply chains. The company plays a central role in moving grains and oilseeds and its activities span the full value chain from origination and storage to processing and trading. Its earnings are influenced by crop prices, crush margins, freight costs, and currency movements, with Bunge Global using hedging and risk-management tools to handle exposure to volatile commodity markets.

feed.title: The J.M. Smucker Company highlights its branded food portfolio as a stable consumer staple
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Company emphasizes its resilient branded food and beverage portfolio, positioning itself as a stable consumer staple through various economic cycles. The company focuses on a brand-centric strategy across categories like spreads, baking ingredients, beverages, and pet food, primarily in North America. This approach aims to secure consistent demand and provide predictable cash flow, key characteristics for consumer staples businesses.

feed.title: Executives on the Move at AIG, HDI, Everest Group and The Andover Cos.
feed.summary: This article details recent executive appointments at several major insurance companies. Nancy Bewlay has been named AIG's EVP and Global Chief Underwriting Officer, Justin Gress is the new COO for HDI Global's U.S. business, and Everest Group Ltd. has appointed Stephen Buonpane as Global Head of Construction and promoted Danielle Stewart to President of Everest Evolution. Additionally, G. Quinn Landers has been appointed SVP and Chief Claims Officer at The Andover Companies, following a retirement.

feed.title: Stifel reiterates Parker-Hannifin stock Hold rating at $1,000 target
feed.summary: Stifel reiterated a Hold rating on Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) stock, setting a $1,000 price target, despite the stock currently trading near that mark and InvestingPro analysis suggesting it is overvalued. The firm noted a strong correlation between the stock's performance and the global PMI index, emphasizing its historical outperformance and strong returns. Despite potential near-term volatility, Stifel maintains a positive risk/reward outlook for Parker-Hannifin over the next 12 months, supported by recent strong financial results, strategic acquisitions, and positive analyst coverage from Bernstein and Raymond James.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips outlines long-term energy strategy as a major U.S. producer
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips, a major independent exploration and production company, is focused on finding, developing, and producing hydrocarbons globally. Its long-term strategy emphasizes capital discipline, managing costs, and generating resilient cash flows while navigating energy transition themes. The company aims to balance reinvestment with returning capital to shareholders, playing a significant role in US and global energy supply.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial balances advice, asset management and retirement demand
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. is highlighted as a diversified financial services provider focusing on wealth management, asset management, and retirement solutions, driven by fee-based advice and capital-light earnings. The company's business model is well-positioned to capitalize on long-term trends like demographic aging and increased demand for personalized financial planning, while navigating market volatility, regulatory changes, and technological advancements.

feed.title: Truist Financial Has Lowered Expectations for OneMain (NYSE:OMF) Stock Price
feed.summary: Truist Financial recently lowered its price target for OneMain (NYSE:OMF) from $73 to $70, though it maintained a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 16% upside. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets downward, yet the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $68. Despite these reduced expectations, OneMain reported strong first-quarter earnings, surpassing EPS and revenue estimates with 6.7% year-over-year revenue growth.

feed.title: GoodData.AI Recognized as Visionary in 2026 Gartner MQ
feed.summary: GoodData.AI has been recognized as a Visionary in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Analytics and Business Intelligence Platforms. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to its AI-native analytics architecture and its progression from a Niche Player, according to CEO Roman Stanek. The recognition reinforces GoodData.AI's focus on developer-centric, embedded analytics platforms that are composable and governed for enterprise needs.

feed.title: Entergy stock leans on utility earnings and regulated growth
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. (ISIN US29364G1031) is a regulated US utility focused on electric and gas services across the Gulf South. The company's earnings are driven by utility rate base growth, storm hardening, and investments in transmission and distribution assets, emphasizing capital spending and regulatory recovery over short-term demand fluctuations. Its operations in states like Louisiana and Texas make it susceptible to weather events and outage costs, tying its stock performance to execution rather than daily news.

feed.title: Citigroup executive hails Kazakhstan's digital transformation
feed.summary: David Livingstone, Chief Client Officer at Citigroup, praised Kazakhstan's digital transformation efforts, highlighting its role in shaping digital innovation globally. He specifically mentioned projects like the State Digital Asset Fund, the development of Alatau city, and the National Bank's digital tenge, which contribute to the country's leading position in innovation. Livingstone also lauded Kazakhstan's agreement with NVIDIA to establish supercomputing capacity, seeing it as a crucial step towards achieving its ambitious digital goals.

feed.title: Form 4 FTAI Aviation Ltd For: 2 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 4 for FTAI Aviation Ltd on July 2nd. It provides various financial market data including indices, commodities, and individual stocks, alongside popular news headlines. The article highlights that FTAI Aviation Ltd's stock (FTAI) was down 3.22%.

feed.title: Pfizer Covid-19 Vaccine from Pfizer Inc. - Company bets on updated protection for US adults
feed.summary: Pfizer's updated Covid-19 Vaccine XBB.1.5 offers tailored protection for US adults against current variants, serving as a single-dose booster. The company has positioned this monovalent mRNA vaccine for the 2024-2025 season, emphasizing its integration into routine pharmacy workflows alongside other seasonal vaccines. Investors are tracking its market impact, focusing on uptake, pricing, and government procurement to assess its ongoing revenue contribution to Pfizer Inc.

feed.title: GoodData.AI Recognized in 2026 Gartner(R) Magic Quadrant(TM) for Analytics and BI Platforms
feed.summary: GoodData.AI has been recognized as a Visionary in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Analytics and Business Intelligence Platforms, a significant advancement from its previous Niche Player status. This recognition highlights the company's investment in its composable, AI-native analytics architecture and its headless semantic layer, designed for developer-centric, embedded analytics. GoodData.AI's CEO, Roman Stanek, believes this validates their approach to providing embedded, governed analytics solutions beyond monolithic BI tools.

feed.title: Franklin Covey Cuts Revenue Forecast, Joins Ouster And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Thursday’s Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: Franklin Covey announced a cut to its full-year revenue guidance, causing its shares to dip by 19.7% in pre-market trading despite reporting a significant improvement in Q3 net income. Several other companies, including Ouster Inc., Certara Inc., and Getty Images Holdings Inc., also saw their stock prices fall in pre-

feed.title: FTAI Aviation (FTAI) COO has 17,973 shares withheld for RSU tax obligations
feed.summary: FTAI Aviation's Chief Operating Officer, Stacy Kuperus, had 17,973 Ordinary Shares withheld by the company to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of restricted stock units. This was a routine, non-market transaction reported on Form 4, with the shares valued at $270.53 each. Following this, Kuperus directly holds 72,653 Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: FTAI Aviation (FTAI) president reports RSU tax share withholding event
feed.summary: FTAI Aviation Ltd. President David Moreno reported a routine tax-related share withholding for vested restricted stock units. The company withheld 41,475 Ordinary Shares at $270.53 per share to cover tax obligations, with no shares sold in the market. Following this transaction, Moreno directly holds 197,015 Ordinary Shares and has indirect holdings of Series D Preferred and Ordinary Shares through a BVI corporation.

feed.title: Google's parent joins the Dow, becoming its fifth Magnificent Seven member
feed.summary: Alphabet (Google's parent company) has joined the Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon and becoming the fifth "Magnificent Seven" member in the index. The move, while largely symbolic, comes as Alphabet faces investor questions regarding its AI spending and compute capacity, leading to its weakest monthly performance in over a year. This inclusion also highlights a broader market trend of money rotating from high-flying tech stocks to established blue-chip companies.

feed.title: Otis adds escalators, inclined elevators at Christ the Redeemer
feed.summary: Otis Brazil has completed a comprehensive modernization of three Gen2 elevators at Christ the Redeemer in Rio de Janeiro, enhancing performance and visitor experience. Additionally, Otis will install four new outdoor-ready Public Escalators and two customized inclined elevators to significantly improve accessibility, particularly for individuals with limited mobility. This project is part of a revitalization plan coinciding with Otis's 120th anniversary in Brazil, reinforcing their long-standing relationship with the iconic monument.

feed.title: P&G recognized as Gartner Supply Chain "Master" for 12th consecutive year
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (P&G) has been recognized by Gartner as a Supply Chain "Master" for the 12th consecutive year in its 2026 Top 25 Supply Chain rankings. This achievement highlights P&G's strong supply chain management and the effective implementation of its Supply 3.0 strategy, which emphasizes resilience and agility. These capabilities ensure product availability for consumers across various markets.

feed.title: Merck stock follows its core business cadence. Investors watch the pipeline.
feed.summary: Merck & Co. maintains its focus on a broad prescription-drug business, a significant US market presence, and a late-stage development pipeline that heavily influences investor sentiment. The company's revenue is primarily derived from branded human health products, with oncology, infectious disease, and vaccines being key commercial areas. Investors closely monitor execution in core therapies, pipeline advancements, and the sustainability of cash generation within the patent-sensitive pharmaceutical industry.

feed.title: Is Fabrinet’s Shift Into Major Russell Indexes Altering The Investment Case For Fabrinet (FN)?
feed.summary: Fabrinet (NYSE:FN) has been added to major Russell large- and mid-cap indexes, including the Russell 1000, and removed from smaller-cap indexes. This reclassification affects how institutional investors access the stock rather than its core fundamentals, which remain tied to demand for optical and AI hardware. The move highlights the importance of liquidity and ownership as the company continues to execute against its financial guidance.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates Stock 7-Day Winning Spree: Stock Climbs 15%
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates stock has experienced a significant 7-day winning streak, resulting in a 15% climb. The article title highlights this strong recent performance.

feed.title: SLB (SLB) Expands Shreveport Footprint And Launches Kuwait Technology Partnership
feed.summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) is expanding its advanced manufacturing presence in the U.S. by moving towards full occupation of the Shreveport Business Park and launching the Ahmadi Innovation Valley partnership in Kuwait with a seven-year contract with Kuwait Oil Company. These strategic moves signify a shift towards advanced manufacturing, digital technology, and energy transition initiatives beyond traditional oilfield services. While the stock has seen recent fluctuations, investors should monitor execution, integration, and the company's ability to translate the Kuwait partnership into differentiated offerings.

feed.title: Insider Spends US$503k Buying More Shares In CarMax
feed.summary: Mark O'Neil, Lead Independent Director at CarMax, recently executed a significant insider purchase, buying US$503k worth of shares at an average price of US$52.36. This transaction increased his holding by 35% and is the largest insider buy in the past year, indicating confidence in the company's future even above the current stock price. The article highlights that CarMax insiders have been buying, not selling, contributing to a positive outlook when combined with their notable ownership levels.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Tyler Technologies (TYL), Datadog (DDOG) and Apple (AAPL)
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of recent analyst ratings for three major technology companies: Tyler Technologies (TYL), Datadog (DDOG), and Apple (AAPL). Truist Financial reiterated a Buy rating for Tyler Technologies with a $440 price target, while Bank of America Securities maintained a Buy rating for Datadog with a $280 price target. UBS analyst David Vogt, however, maintained a Hold rating on Apple with a $296 price target.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Replenishes Share Buyback Authorization to $2.5 Billion
feed.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. has announced the replenishment of its share buyback authorization to $2.5 billion. This decision comes amidst recent news of Dollar Tree stockholders selling 12.8 million shares to JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs, and the company's plan for a secondary stock sale and a $500 million repurchase. The discount retailer continues to manage its financial strategies while analysts adjust price targets and maintain ratings.

feed.title: Zacks Research Decreases Earnings Estimates for Devon Energy
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q2 2028 earnings per share estimate for Devon Energy (NYSE: DVN) from $1.05 to $1.02, maintaining a "Hold" rating on the stock. Despite this cautious outlook, many analysts still recommend Devon Energy as a "Moderate Buy." The company recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.32 per share, yielding 3.2% annually, even after its last quarterly results missed revenue and EPS expectations.

feed.title: Zacks Research Analysts Reduce Earnings Estimates for FAF
feed.summary: Zacks Research has reduced its Q2 2028 EPS estimate for First American Financial (FAF) to $2.01 from $2.07, maintaining a "Hold" rating. Despite this, the company holds an average "Moderate Buy" rating from other analysts with a consensus price target of $83.25. First American Financial recently exceeded Q1 earnings expectations, reporting $1.33 per share against a $1.06 estimate, with revenue increasing 16.2% year-over-year to $1.85 billion.

feed.title: AFLAC Inc. focuses on insurance growth and long-term stability
feed.summary: AFLAC Inc. is highlighted as a major supplemental insurance provider with a business model focused on consistent policy growth and sound capital management, operating primarily in the U.S. and Japan. The company emphasizes financial discipline, product specialization, and widespread distribution networks, positioning itself for long-term stability amidst rising healthcare costs and demographic shifts. Aflac's strategy includes value creation through policy growth, underwriting margins, investment income, and returning capital to shareholders via dividends and share repurchases.

feed.title: ONEOK Inc focuses on natural gas infrastructure as investors weigh long-term income potential
feed.summary: ONEOK Inc. operates a significant midstream natural gas network in the United States, offering investors fee-based pipeline and storage assets that generate stable cash flows and dividend income. The company's business model centers on gathering, processing, transporting, and storing natural gas and natural gas liquids, providing critical infrastructure that supports various sectors and aims for resilience against commodity price fluctuations. ONEOK's strategy involves network expansion, asset optimization, and maintaining strong customer relationships, while its investment appeal lies in steady cash generation, measured leverage, and consistent dividend payments.

feed.title: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ: DLTR) renews $2.5B share repurchase authorization
feed.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) has renewed its share repurchase authorization to an aggregate of $2.5 billion, restoring the limit set in July 2025. This reauthorization follows a $500 million repurchase in June 2026 and allows the company to buy back shares through various methods with no expiration date. The move is highlighted by management as part of disciplined capital allocation and a commitment to returning excess capital to shareholders while supporting long-term growth.

feed.title: Hologic removes BioZorb 3D bioabsorbable markers due to safety reasons
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. is recalling its BioZorb Marker due to a significant number of reported complications and adverse events, including pain, infection, and device migration, though no deaths have occurred. The implantable radiographic marker, used to identify soft tissues like breast tissue for medical procedures, consists of both permanent titanium and resorbable plastic components. The recall comes after 252 reported injuries were linked to the device.

feed.title: Travelers Companies focuses on underwriting discipline as insurance cycle shifts
feed.summary: Travelers Companies, a prominent US property-casualty insurer, is navigating changes in the insurance landscape by emphasizing underwriting discipline, meticulous risk selection, and maintaining strong capital. The company's strategy involves carefully evaluating risks, setting appropriate premiums, and avoiding aggressive growth to ensure consistent profitability. Travelers is considered a bellwether for insurance trends, with its performance reflecting broader economic activity and influencing the financial sector for US retail investors and analysts.

feed.title: Amazon To Rally Over 29%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
feed.summary: This article compiles ten top analyst rating changes for various companies, including Amazon.com (AMZN). Wells Fargo boosted Amazon's price target to $313, maintaining an Overweight rating, with Amazon shares closing at $241.70. Other analyst updates include changes for Robinhood, Westlake, Genmab, Levi Strauss, Generac Holdings, General Mills, PepsiCo, Palantir Technologies, and Alaska Air Group.

feed.title: Vertex’s Casgevy becomes first approved gene therapy for young kids with rare blood disorders
feed.summary: The FDA has approved an expansion for Vertex Pharmaceuticals’ gene therapy Casgevy, allowing its use in children aged 2 years and up with sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia. This marks Casgevy as the first genetic medicine for these indications available to young children and was expedited via the Commissioner’s National Priority Voucher program. While initially approved for patients 12 and older, this new approval opens the treatment to approximately 5,500 additional U.S. patients, despite initial slow uptake with the therapy generating $43 million in the first quarter.

feed.title: Ventas Inc focuses on senior housing and healthcare real estate as demand stays resilient
feed.summary: Ventas Inc is a major healthcare real estate investment trust (REIT) specializing in senior housing, medical offices, and other healthcare facilities. The company's portfolio is strategically positioned to benefit from long-term demographic trends, particularly an aging population, driving demand for specialized care and housing solutions. Ventas Inc balances growth initiatives with its income-oriented REIT structure, distributing a significant portion of taxable income to shareholders through dividends, while also investing in new developments and acquisitions.

feed.title: Enterprise value to revenue forward of Stryker Corporation – FWB:SYK
feed.summary: This article provides the enterprise value to forward revenue for Stryker Corporation (FWB:SYK), listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. It indicates that the market is currently closed, with no trades recorded. The content is presented within the financial data section of TradingView, focusing purely on this specific financial metric for the company.

feed.title: Here’s Why Fortinet, Inc. (FTNT) Is Among the Most Profitable Software Stocks to Buy
feed.summary: Fortinet, Inc. (FTNT) is considered one of the most profitable software stocks to buy, with BofA and TD Cowen recently raising their price targets due to strong demand and growth prospects in SASE, AI integration, and core firewall spending. The company, a leading cybersecurity provider, holds over 20% market share in the firewall segment, which is projected to see significant growth.

feed.title: Dollar Tree, Inc. Announces $2.5 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization
feed.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) has announced that its Board of Directors has reauthorized a $2.5 billion share repurchase program. This replenishment follows a recent $500 million repurchase in June 2026 and reaffirms the company's commitment to returning capital to shareholders and supporting long-term growth initiatives. The authorization allows for open market or privately negotiated transactions and has no expiration date.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line focuses on service quality as investors watch the trucking cycle
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) is prioritizing reliable less-than-truckload (LTL) service and disciplined cost control amidst a fluctuating freight market. The company operates by consolidating smaller shipments through a dense network of terminals, emphasizing operational efficiency, and using technology to optimize its services. ODFL positions itself as a premium LTL provider, focusing on network density, technology investments, and a diversified customer base to navigate economic shifts and maintain pricing discipline.
